---
title: "Flatten MOD_xxx Namespace into UIAO_NNN Canon — Single-Registry Consolidation"
subtitle: "Architecture Decision Record · ADR-060 · PROPOSED"
date: 2026-05-10
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Architecture Decision Record

**ADR-060** — status: **PROPOSED** — decided: **2026-05-10**

This page renders the canonical ADR source verbatim. The authoritative
source is at [`src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-060-mod-namespace-flatten-into-uiao-canon.md`](../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-060-mod-namespace-flatten-into-uiao-canon.md).
Any change to this ADR's content happens in the source file; this
wrapper is regenerated by `scripts/generate_adr_qmd_wrappers.py` per
[ADR-068](adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-060-mod-namespace-flatten-into-uiao-canon.md >}}
